Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Games.CommonGameParameters<T>

All Known Subinterfaces:
Games.ChannelFilter, Games.Filter, Games.GameParams, Games.SearchFilter
Enclosing interface:
Games
public static interface Games.CommonGameParameters<T>

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default T
    accuracy()
     
    T
    accuracy(boolean accuracy)
    Include accuracy percent of each player, when available.
    Default `false`
    default T
    clocks()
     
    T
    clocks(boolean clocks)
    Include clock comments in the PGN moves, when available.
    Default `true`
    default T

    T
    division(boolean division)
    Include plies which mark the beginning of the middlegame and endgame.

    Include the PGN moves.
    Default `true`

    Include the opening name.
    Default `true`

    pgn()
     
    T
    pgn(boolean pgn)
    Include the full PGN within the JSON response, in a pgn field.
    Default `false`

    • division

      T division(boolean division)
      Include plies which mark the beginning of the middlegame and endgame. Not available in pgnBy...-methods
      Default `false` (except in Games.byGameId(String), where it is default `true`)

    • division

      default T division()

    • opening

      T opening(boolean opening)
      Include the opening name.
      Default `true`

      Include accuracy percent of each player, when available.
      Default `false`
